# Netscape HTTP Cookie File
# This file was generated by export_cookies.sh
# See README.md for instructions on how to populate this file.
#
# Format: domain  include_subdomains  path  secure  expiry  name  value
#
# Replace this file with your actual YouTube cookies exported from your browser.
# The bot works without cookies for public videos, but cookies are required for:
#   - Age-restricted content
#   - Members-only content
#   - Private playlists
#   - Avoiding bot-detection throttling
